notes.f1: Not recovered — the agent concluded the OPPOSITE ('did not migrate') and wrote an Ohio death/burial (1849 Coshocton) into the tree. It never searched the destination kin cluster (sons Joseph/William in Green County, WI), never found the 1854 Monroe marriage or the 1847 BLM land entry, searched for her in the 1840 WI census (wrong year — she moved ~1846), and treated that nil plus the Find A Grave Ohio-burial misdirection as proof of non-migration.
notes.f2: Wrong: tree Death = 1849 Coshocton, Ohio, vs the expected 27 Dec 1848 Monroe, Green, Wisconsin. Consistent with the false non-migration conclusion.
